untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (busted patterns, breakout identification, new trend establishment) requires historical pattern recognition and multi-bar analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires identifying: (1) a prior breakout event, (2) a decline less than 5% from that breakout high, and (3) confirmation of a new trend, which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using returns < -5% (decline condition) and close > prev_close (upward movement after decline). However, the core pattern logic—identifying busted breakouts and trend confirmation—requires structural pattern recognition beyond available indicators. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector or providing breakout_high/breakout_bar inputs.
